text:
There once was a little girl named Olive who lived in a giant oak tree. She never got sick because she breathed just leaves.

One day, an orange bird swooped down. It sang a beautiful song.

"Ancients liked orange birds," thought Olive.

She chased him.

He chirped. "You couldn't catch me!"

She didn't stop. He flew away slowly.

Suddenly...

"You're right!" she cried.

She snatched an orange feather.

Later, an old woman passed.

"Hello dear."

Olive hopped onto her shoulder.

"Oh Olive love."

She stroked Olive.

Just then a big owl hooted.

She squeezed her eyelids tight.

Owl eyes...

"You know everything."

Olive smiled.

The old woman patted her.

They flew away.

Olive loved the oak tree.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
